Place the official Microsoft Authentication Library for JavaScript browser bundle here.

Expected file:
- /assets/js/vendor/msal-browser.min.js

Recommended approach:
1. Run: npm install @azure/msal-browser
2. Copy the browser bundle from the installed package into this folder.
3. Keep the filename as msal-browser.min.js so the Secure subsite can load it.

Note: The MSAL browser CDN has been deprecated. Use the official package locally.
